_connection_help.localhost: Use 127.0.0.1 if Rhino runs on the same machine
_connection_help.wsl2: Use your Windows gateway IP (run: ip route show default | awk '{print $3}')
_connection_help.remote: Use the Tailscale/LAN IP of the Windows machine running Rhino

_screenshots_help: linux_dir: where screenshots are saved. windows_dir: UNC path for WSL2 (e.g. \\wsl.localhost\Ubuntu\path\to\captures). Leave empty if not using WSL.
